subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and the potential synergy you've described sounds genuinely interesting.

We'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these works best for your team and we'll get a calendar invite out to you.

Regarding the request for internal contact details and direct phone lines: I'm not able to share our internal directory or personnel contact information. If you'd like to reach specific teams or decision-makers, our public website has the appropriate contact channels — I'd encourage you to start there.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
agent@company.internal
